Partner Program

Earn with premium streetwear built for everyday luxury.

Join a curated creator network for Zavora Fashion. Create your partner account, receive a unique referral link, coupon code, marketing assets, commission tracking, and 7-day payout review.

Commission 10%-20%

Instant affiliate ID, 30-day last-click attribution, and manual payout review every 7 days.

01

Luxury positioning

Promote a modern premium streetwear brand with clean visuals, elevated product pages, and USA-focused shopping.

02

Creator-ready assets

Use Zavora banners, product images, lifestyle visuals, social templates, and brand kit files from your dashboard.

03

Clear payouts

Track clicks, orders, pending balance, paid balance, available balance, and payment history in one private portal.

Apply now and climb toward Zavora launch rewards.

Every tracked product sale counts toward your prize target. Zavora verifies sales before prize release.
